keywords.description: Job title or role keywords (e.g. 'software engineer', 'head of sales')

company_name.description: Company name to filter jobs (e.g. 'Acme Corp'). Optional — omit for broad keyword search.

location.description: Location filter (e.g. 'United States', 'San Francisco, CA'). Optional.

days_back.description: Only return jobs posted in the last N days. Supports 1, 7, or 30. Defaults to 30.

max_jobs.description: Maximum number of jobs to return. Defaults to 20.

linkedin_url.description: Pass a direct LinkedIn job search URL to bypass keyword/company building. If provided, keywords/company/location/days_back are ignored.
